message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series idxmin/idxmax, nlargest/nsmallest, and pct_change with tests

Implement five additional pandas-compatible Series methods with comprehensive
test coverage (13 new tests):

- idxmin/idxmax: return the index label of the minimum/maximum value, skipping
  nulls. Errors on all-null series. Matches pandas series.idxmin()/idxmax().

- nlargest(n)/nsmallest(n): return a new Series with the n largest/smallest
  values in descending/ascending order, preserving index labels. Nulls are
  excluded from ranking. If n exceeds non-null count, returns all non-null
  values. Matches pandas series.nlargest()/nsmallest().

- pct_change(periods): compute percentage change between current and prior
  element offset by `periods`. First `periods` elements become NaN. Null
  inputs propagate as NaN. Division by zero produces NaN. Matches pandas
  series.pct_change().

Tests cover: basic numeric behavior, null handling, index preservation,
n-exceeds-length edge case, multi-period offsets, and float precision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
